name: job-smith
description: JobSmith — a privacy-first, local-only Chrome extension that tracks remote job listings, tailors your resume on-device (WebLLM), and politely auto-fills application forms. No servers, no third-party data processing.
author: Jintu Kumar Das <jintukumardas@gmail.com>

scripts.package: npm run build && node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');execSync('cd dist && zip -r -X ../job-smith.zip .',{stdio:'inherit'})"
